title: Compare Two Numbers

# Write your code here

title: Temperature Advice
description: Read a temperature as an integer. Print Cold if it is below 10, Warm if it is 10 to 25, and Hot otherwise.
starter_code:

# Write your code here

title: Sum Numbers with a Loop
description: Read an integer n and print the sum of all numbers from 1 to n inclusive.
starter_code:
n = int(input())
total = 0
# Write your loop here
print(total)

title: Find the Largest List Item
description: Read a line of space-separated integers and print the largest number in the list.
starter_code:
numbers = [int(x) for x in input().split()]
# Write your code here
